title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, Continue, login
scenario: White screen with spinner shown instead of Support > App data after Guest user logs into Lens account
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Complete the onboarding process as a Guest.
5. Tap 'Continue' to begin the login process.
6. Complete the login process to a Lens account.
7. Observe the screen after login completes.
expected: The screen displays the correct data: App version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection.
